summary: VOID+MIND decide with strict effect-risk gates for external / boundary work
description: Encodes a ward tuned for network-adjacent or externally scoped decisions: VOID+MIND aspects and tight effect-risk / allow thresholds so ALLOW stays conservative without hand-merging PolicyThresholds each time.
recommended_for: Decisions that touch external systems, APIs, or untrusted boundaries
When you want the same ward thresholds every time you phrase a boundary check

recommendation.why_better: Bundled aspects plus ward thresholds stay aligned; provenance shows which preset you used—less error than copying threshold numbers into ad hoc JSON.
